title: AI Photo Analysis and Auto-Tagging
description: Integrate OpenAI Vision API to analyze uploaded photos. Implement automatic analysis triggered after upload (async, non-blocking). Generate and store: AI feedback on composition/technique, auto-generated tags (5-10 per photo), suggested caption for social sharing. Display AI insights on photo detail page. Implement rate limiting to control API costs. Gate full AI features behind paid tier (free users get limited monthly analyses). Out of scope: edit suggestions, style transfer.
